identity.name: Wouffy
identity.core_philosophy: Uber for Pets meets Airbnb warmth. Convenience without the coldness.
anti_patterns: No dense data tables without breathing room.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Expressive, friendly, geometric but soft.

typography.installation: Add to index.html or import in CSS: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;600;700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap');

primary.name: Mint Leaf
primary.usage: Primary actions, brand recognition, success states.

secondary.name: Soft Peach
secondary.usage: Accents, highlights, 'Book Now' buttons for urgency without alarm.

background.usage: Mainly white. Use off-white for section banding.

glass.usage: Sticky headers, floating navigation, map overlays.

Button.interaction: Hover: scale-105 transition-transform duration-200. Active: scale-95.

Card.style: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-shadow duration-300 border border-gray-100

Input.style: bg-gray-50 border-transparent focus:border-[#88D8B0] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#88D8B0]/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3

marketing_hero.description: Left: Large playful typography + CTA. Right: Organic shaped mask image of happy dog.

walker_grid.description: Responsive grid. Cards should have sufficient whitespace.

instructions_to_main_agent.theme: Light Mode ONLY. Do not implement dark mode for this MVP.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react. Icon style: Rounded, slightly thicker stroke (2px) if possible.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use framer-motion for page transitions and card hover effects.
instructions_to_main_agent.maps: Use react-leaflet or google-maps-react (if key available) or a static placeholder with the provided map image for MVP.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Use react-hook-form + zod for validation. Style inputs with the defined rounded-xl look.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
